description: User 2 (services@getsally.io): Adds Google Drive folder data to EXISTING pipeline. MCP asks 'new or existing?' — user says existing again. Tests deep dedup: 35 overlap CSV + 35 overlap Sheet = 70 dups, only 35 truly new.

steps.description: User provides Google Drive folder URL. MCP MUST detect existing runs and ask.
steps.user_prompt: I've got more files on Drive: https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1bBZFN5Yg2qe7VGj_LATAM_batches
user_prompt_variants: Also check this Drive folder with 3 CSV files: https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1bBZFN5Yg2qe7VGj_LATAM_batches
Here's a Drive folder with more companies: https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1bBZFN5Yg2qe7VGj_LATAM_batches
Last batch — files in this folder: https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1bBZFN5Yg2qe7VGj_LATAM_batches
steps.critical_requirement: MCP MUST mention the existing 2 runs and 180 companies. Must NOT auto-launch. Must ask user.

user_prompt_variants: Add to the existing pipeline, don't create a new one
Yep, same project, just add these files
steps.critical_requirement: Drive folder has 105 companies across 3 files. 35 overlap with CSV (batch 2), 35 overlap with Sheet (batch 3). Only 35 from batch 1 are truly new. Project dedup catches all 70.

user_prompt_variants: Check blacklist for the drive import

db_checks: gathering_runs has 3 runs for Result project (CSV + Sheet + Drive)
discovered_companies has exactly 215 unique domains for Result project
No domain appears twice in discovered_companies for this project
Each run has CompanySourceLink records tracking which run discovered each company
Blacklist is consistent across all runs (project-scoped)

ui_checks.check: Same classification prompt applied across all runs
